theme_archetype.name: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) + Vibrancy
theme_archetype.rationale: The user explicitly requested Primary Red, Secondary Black, and White Background with a fast, professional UI. We merge the high-contrast authority of Archetype 4 with the energetic warmth needed for an event/birthday celebration company. It avoids the cold 'tech-bro' blue and uses bold, crisp contrasts.

headings.rationale: Outfit brings a modern, geometric, yet friendly feel that suits celebration events while remaining highly professional for a CRM.

primary.description: Vibrant, energetic red for primary actions, badges, and highlights.

secondary.description: Pitch black for high-contrast secondary buttons, text, and deep accents.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. The bento grid style is used for the dashboard to keep data dense but breathable.

navigation.desktop: sidebar layout (fixed left, w-64, bg-white border-r border-black/5)
navigation.mobile: bottom tab navigation (fixed bottom, h-16, bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-black/5 z-50)

cards.base: bg-white border border-black/5 rounded-3xl shadow-sm transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-[#E63946] text-white hover:bg-[#D90429] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95 shadow-md shadow-red-500/20
buttons.secondary: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white hover:bg-[#1F1F1F] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border-2 border-black/10 text-black hover:border-black rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-all duration-200

inputs.base: w-full bg-white border border-black/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-black placeholder-black/40 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E63946] focus:border-transparent transition-all duration-200

kanban.column: bg-[#F8F9FA] rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-4 min-h-[500px]
kanban.item: bg-white border border-black/5 rounded-xl p-4 shadow-sm cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing hover:border-red-500/30 transition-colors

animations.micro_interactions: Smooth transforms on hover (-translate-y-1) for cards. Scale down (active:scale-95) for buttons to feel tactile.
animations.page_transitions: Framer Motion: initial { opacity: 0, y: 10 } animate { opacity: 1, y: 0 } transition { duration: 0.3 }
animations.lists: Staggered entrance animations for kanban boards and table rows.

testing.rule: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

logo_placeholder.description: Abstract red shape to be used as a stylized brand header or placeholder background for the logo.

avatars.description: Smiling professional headshot for staff/user avatars.
Smiling professional headshot for staff/user avatars.

event_inspiration.description: Red balloon decoration. Use for empty states, login screen backgrounds, or package visual banners.
Red and black balloons. Fits the branding perfectly for decorative background elements.
Birthday party decoration setup. Use as a placeholder for completed bookings or package visuals.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette: Primary Red (#E63946) and Secondary Black (#0A0A0A). Do NOT default to Tailwind's blue or slate.
Use 'Outfit' font for headings and 'DM Sans' for body. If using Google Fonts, import them via CSS.
Ensure all cards use 'rounded-2xl' or 'rounded-3xl' for the requested soft touch, combined with crisp 1px borders (border-black/5).
Implement the mobile layout with a fixed bottom navigation bar containing icons for Dashboard, Bookings, Calendar, and Profile.
For the Kanban pipeline, use a soft background for the columns (#F8F9FA) and crisp white cards inside.
Calendar should highlight booked dates in red and available dates in green as specified.
Use Framer Motion for smooth entrances and state transitions.
Ensure buttons are large and touch-friendly (min 48px height/width).
MUST include data-testid attributes on every interactive element.
